allow_auto_provision.name: Google OIDC - Allow Auto Provision
allow_auto_provision.remark: Whether unknown directory users may be auto-provisioned. Allowed values: true, false.

backend_redirects.name: Google OIDC - Backend Redirects
backend_redirects.remark: Allowed backend redirect targets, typically one entry per line or a delimited list.

client_id.name: Google OIDC - Client ID
client_id.remark: OAuth/OIDC client identifier issued by the identity provider.

client_secret.name: Google OIDC - Client Secret
client_secret.remark: OAuth/OIDC client secret. Leave blank or masked to keep the existing value.

default_backend_redirect.name: Google OIDC - Default Backend Redirect
default_backend_redirect.remark: Default post-login backend redirect target when backend redirect is enabled.

enable_backend_redirect.name: Google OIDC - Enable Backend Redirect
enable_backend_redirect.remark: Whether backend redirect allow-list enforcement is enabled. Allowed values: true, false.

enable_one_tap.name: Google OIDC - Enable One Tap
enable_one_tap.remark: Whether Google One Tap is enabled on the login page. Allowed values: true, false.

redirect_url.name: Google OIDC - Redirect URL
redirect_url.remark: OAuth/OIDC callback URL registered with the identity provider.
